title: MBTI & Saju Analysis: Submit valid inputs and view results
description: Verifies an authenticated user can submit birth date and MBTI info from the landing flow and see analysis results.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /
Open the MBTI & Saju analysis start flow
Fill a valid birth date into the birth date field
Select a valid MBTI option
Submit the analysis request
Verify analyzed results are displayed

title: MBTI & Saju Analysis: Invalid or incomplete birth date shows validation guidance
description: Verifies the analysis form blocks submission and shows a validation error when birth date is incomplete or invalid.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /
Open the MBTI & Saju analysis start flow
Fill an incomplete or invalid value into the birth date field
Select a valid MBTI option
Submit the analysis request
Verify a birth date validation error and guidance is visible

title: MBTI & Saju Analysis: Results modal can be dismissed and user returns to landing flow
description: Verifies users can close the analysis results view and continue using the landing page.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /
Open the MBTI & Saju analysis start flow
Fill a valid birth date into the birth date field
Select a valid MBTI option
Submit the analysis request
Close the analysis results view
Verify the landing page primary content is visible

title: MBTI & Saju Analysis: Prevent submission when MBTI is not selected
description: Verifies the form prevents submission and indicates a validation issue when MBTI is missing.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /
Open the MBTI & Saju analysis start flow
Fill a valid birth date into the birth date field
Submit the analysis request
Verify an MBTI selection validation error is visible

title: MBTI & Saju Analysis: Form inputs can be edited before submission
description: Verifies users can change birth date and MBTI inputs prior to submitting analysis.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /
Open the MBTI & Saju analysis start flow
Fill a valid birth date into the birth date field
Select a valid MBTI option
Change the birth date to another valid value
Change the MBTI selection to another valid option
Verify the updated birth date and MBTI selections are reflected in the form

title: Community Interaction: Browse, search, tag filter, and like a post
description: Verifies users can scroll posts, filter by search and tag, then like a post and see acknowledgment.

steps.description: Navigate to /community
Scroll through the post list
Fill a short query into the search field
Submit the search
Click a tag to filter posts by topic
Like a post from the filtered list
Verify the like is acknowledged for the post

title: Community Interaction: Attempt to create a new post prompts sign-in guidance
description: Verifies creating a post from the community page triggers authentication-required guidance when not signed in.

steps.description: Navigate to /community
Open the create-new-post flow from the community page
Verify an authentication required prompt or sign-in guidance is visible

title: Community Interaction: Community page loads primary post list content
description: Verifies the community page loads and displays the primary post list without requiring authentication.

steps.description: Navigate to /community
Verify a list of community posts is displayed

title: Community Interaction: Clear search to return to broader post list
description: Verifies removing the search query returns the user to a broader set of posts.

steps.description: Navigate to /community
Fill a short query into the search field
Submit the search
Clear the search field
Submit the search
Verify the post list is no longer restricted by the prior search query

title: Community Interaction: Toggle like on a post
description: Verifies a user can like and then unlike the same post, with UI acknowledgment updating accordingly.

steps.description: Navigate to /community
Like a post
Like the same post again to toggle the state
Verify the post returns to the unliked state

title: Deep Counseling Chat: Select theme, send message, receive AI response, continue conversation
description: Verifies an authenticated user can start a chat by selecting a theme, send a message, receive a response, and continue the conversation.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /chat
Select a counseling theme
Fill a message into the chat input
Send the message
Wait for the AI response to appear
Fill a follow-up message into the chat input
Send the follow-up message
Verify both user messages and at least one AI response are displayed in the conversation

title: Deep Counseling Chat: Chat page loads and allows theme selection
description: Verifies the authenticated chat page loads its primary UI and allows selecting a counseling theme.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /chat
Select a counseling theme
Verify the chat interface is ready for message input

title: Deep Counseling Chat: Prevent sending an empty message
description: Verifies the chat UI blocks sending when the message input is empty.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /chat
Select a counseling theme
Ensure the chat input is empty
Attempt to send the message
Verify the message is not added to the conversation

title: Deep Counseling Chat: Change counseling theme before sending message
description: Verifies a user can change the selected theme before sending messages and the UI reflects the latest selection.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /chat
Select a counseling theme
Select a different counseling theme
Verify the currently selected counseling theme is updated

title: Request and view today's daily fortune card
description: Verifies an unauthenticated user can request and view today's fortune results on the fortune page.

steps.description: Navigate to /fortune
Request today's fortune
Verify a daily fortune card is displayed
Verify fortune details are displayed

title: Daily fortune result remains readable on mobile after request
description: Verifies the fortune result layout remains readable without content overflow after requesting today's fortune.

steps.description: Navigate to /fortune
Request today's fortune
Scroll through the fortune result content
Verify the fortune result content remains readable without overlapping or clipped sections
Verify the daily fortune card and details remain accessible while scrolling

title: Request daily fortune multiple times in the same session
description: Verifies requesting today's fortune again updates or re-renders the displayed fortune result without breaking the UI.

steps.description: Navigate to /fortune
Request today's fortune
Request today's fortune again
Verify a daily fortune card is displayed
Verify fortune details are displayed

title: Fortune page loads primary content
description: Verifies the fortune page loads and presents the primary entry point to request a daily fortune.

steps.description: Navigate to /fortune
Verify the daily fortune request entry point is available

title: Daily fortune page remains usable after rapid repeated requests
description: Verifies the UI stays responsive and continues to show a fortune result after repeated requests.

steps.description: Navigate to /fortune
Request today's fortune
Request today's fortune
Request today's fortune
Verify a daily fortune card is displayed
Verify fortune details are displayed

title: Login and view profile summary on MyPage
description: Verifies an authenticated user can log in and see their profile summary on MyPage.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the link to open the MyPage area
Verify the profile summary is displayed

title: Login and view usage history entries from MyPage
description: Verifies an authenticated user can navigate to MyPage and view usage history information.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the link to open the MyPage area
Scroll to the usage history section
Verify usage history entries are displayed or an empty state message is visible

title: MyPage handles empty or unavailable history state
description: Verifies MyPage shows a clear empty state when usage history data is not available in the UI.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the link to open the MyPage area
Scroll to the usage history section
Verify an empty history message is visible or usage history entries are displayed

title: Login and open full Usage History page from MyPage
description: Verifies an authenticated user can navigate from MyPage to the Usage History page and see history content.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the link to open the MyPage area
Click the link to view detailed usage history
Verify credit usage and purchase logs are displayed or an empty state message is visible

title: MyPage basic scroll and interaction on mobile-sized layout
description: Verifies MyPage remains navigable and content sections are accessible via scrolling without layout breakage.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the link to open the MyPage area
Scroll to the bottom of the page
Verify key profile and history sections remain readable and accessible while scrolling
